# sql-schema-audit

> Index coverage and N+1 review aids for SQLite/D1 schemas with a sqlc catalog. Surfaces unused indexes (with FK CASCADE awareness so cascade-load-bearing indexes are not flagged), queries that scan tables without index help, and `for`-loops calling generated SQL fns.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/sql/schema-audit
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/sql/schema-audit
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients). Copy
the folder into your agent's skills directory (`~/.claude/skills/` for user
scope, `.claude/skills/` for a project):

```bash
npx degit mizchi/skills/sql/schema-audit ~/.claude/skills/sql-schema-audit
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
